title: DOE Budget Authority for Energy, Research, Development, and Demonstration Database
summary: A database tracking budget requests on energy-technology research, development, and demonstraton (RD&D) from 1978–2006.
body: (Appendix to Chapter 6) The latest from Belfer See more This page is for archival purposes as its content is no longer available.
